title: RenderRush
description: Experience Minecraft at its smoothest with RenderRush, a finely tuned performance-focused modpack built to squeeze every drop of power from your system — without changing the soul of vanilla gameplay.
body:
![RenderRush](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6534f32197df5b44dd699349aeb0cfa2c0a02c1.png)Category: Performance

**RenderRush** is a next-generation Minecraft performance modpack built for players who want ultra-smooth gameplay without sacrificing the vanilla feel. Every mod has been fine-tuned to boost FPS, shorten load times, and enhance chunk rendering — giving you a lightning-fast, stutter-free experience.

With cutting-edge optimization tools like Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, FerriteCore, and ModernFix, RenderRush can deliver up to 4× better performance on most systems. Whether you’re exploring huge worlds, running a server, or building massive bases, this pack keeps everything crisp and fluid.

⚡ Key Features:

- Clean, vanilla-style performance overhaul
- Faster world rendering and higher FPS
- Optimized CPU, GPU, and memory usage
- Shaders and texture packs supported
- No unnecessary gameplay or content changes

Get the best of Minecraft — faster, cleaner, and smoother than ever.
Experience the rush of performance with RenderRush.
